tools.name: doing
tools.description: Manage the doing task stack. Add a task, complete one, list tasks, or view the full stack with UI.

tools.name: history
tools.description: View all completed tasks in chronological order (from oldest to most recent)

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "doing" appears informational but accepts parameters (command) that enable code/file/secret access.
